title: Trojan Women kick off International Festival of Ancient Greek Drama
description: The Spanish production of Euripides’ The Trojan Women, directed by Carlota Ferrer, will open the 29th edition of the International Festival of Ancient Greek Drama next month. Produced by Come y Calla Productions in collaboration with the Mérida International Classical Theatre Festival, The Trojan Women will be presented at Curium Ancient Theatre on July 3 [...]

title: AI to decode Maharashtra’s ancient Konkan petroglyphs for UNESCO bid
description: Daijiworld Media Network – Mumbai Mumbai, Jun 27: Maharashtra is turning to Artificial Intelligence (AI) to study and decode thousands of prehistoric petroglyphs spread across the Konkan region, in a move aimed at strengthening India’s bid for UNESCO World Heritage status for....

title: smuggling case tamilnadu Ancient amman statue smuggling case three arrested
description: തമിഴ്‌നാട്ടിലെ ഒരു ക്ഷേത്രത്തിൽ നിന്ന് വിഗ്രഹം മോഷ്ടിച്ചതാണെന്ന് ചോദ്യം ചെയ്യലിൽ നിന്ന് വ്യക്തമായി.

title: NASA Rover Detects Complex Carbon In Mars Rocks, Hinting At Ancient Microbial Life
description: The discovery means that NASA’s rovers have now found organic-bearing mudstones more than 2,000 miles apart on Mars. NASA’s Perseverance rover has found complex carbon molecules in rocks on Mars, adding to growing interest in signs that the planet may once have supported life. The discovery was made in rocks that scientists have already been studying for... The post NASA Rover Detects Complex Carbon In Mars Rocks, Hinting At Ancient Microbial Life appeared first on Read Selective .

title: UPSC Mains Answer Practice — GS 1: traditional knowledge systems and ancient Indian society (Week 160)
description: UPSC Civil Services Mains Exam 2026: This week's GS Paper 1 questions cover important themes: traditional knowledge systems and the significance of Rakhigarhi in the study of the Harappan Civilisation. Enhance your answer-writing skills with structured guidance and self-evaluation prompts.
